expected_effect: Lift screen mean_edge by improving low-intensity and selective volatile slices without a full state-surface rewrite.
rationale: Reduce broad cooldown and size-memory carry, strengthen reactive danger terms, then restore a small amount of calm-side recapture so the live 49 bps surface is less reliant on coarse carry and more on explicit risk gating.
title: Targeted carry shift with calm recapture
